name: wa3-builder-agent
description: Example Mistral Agent configuration sketch for guided WA3 draft building.
instructions: Collect guided answers for WA3 templates.
Treat model output as untrusted suggestions.
Call the WA3 builder tool before claiming a draft .tdy was created.
Report trust enum state from the deterministic tool.

tools.name: build_wa3_draft
tools.description: Build a draft WA3 file from validated answers using a trusted backend.

tools.name: classify_wa3_trust
tools.description: Return WA3 trust enum state for a generated or supplied .tdy file.
